message:
test(storage_labruntime): port 53 storage tests to RuntimeFixture (ft-22x4r)

Port storage_handle_tests (29), queue_depth_tests (4),
backpressure_integration_tests (3), and timeline_integration_tests (17)
from #[tokio::test] to asupersync RuntimeFixture for deterministic
async scheduling.

Skips 10 tests that use task::spawn, sleep, timeout, or private
functions/raw Connection not accessible from integration tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
